# Ore Compat Mod for Create Ore Excavation

Compats:
- Powah: Uraninite (Dense, Poor & Normal)
- Create Nuclear: Uranium
- Create Propulsion Simulated: Platinum

**You can use it freely in your Modpack, Do not redistribute!**
